theorem_title: Spectral product paper: whole-paper direct main theorem baseline
theorem_statement: Let E be measurable with measure 1 and E subset [0, 3/2 - epsilon]. Let F subset R^m be bounded and measurable with positive measure. If E x F is spectral, then E and F are spectral.

baseline_metadata.paper_title: Spectrality of Product Sets with a Perturbed Interval Factor
notes: This file intentionally avoids Formal Islands optional context fields so the direct-root theorem statement remains clean.
The anti-axiom/citation-smuggling policy is included in raw_proof_text as part of the proof context.
